findings.description: The font size variables (@smallestFontSize, @smallerFontSize, @baseFontSize, @largerFontSize, @largestFontSize) present in the source code block for nablarch-css-conf-multicol are omitted from the knowledge file code block. These are configurable CSS variables that a user might want to adjust when customizing the layout.
#aside.noMenu is explicitly named as a modification point in both the source and the knowledge file content, but is absent from the s4 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「メニューを使用しない画面でサイドバー部のマージン調整を行う場合には、#aside.noMenu 部の.grid-colに指定している値を変更する」. Knowledge file s4 content also mentions #aside.noMenu as a modification point.
